title: ஊட்டிப் பயணம் (Trip to Ooty - Prose) - முக்கிய வினாக்கள்
subject: english

questions.question: Choose the correct verb form: The doorbell rang while I ______ my homework.
questions.explanation: The past progressive tense (was doing) is used to show an overlapping action in the past when another action (the doorbell ringing) occurred.

questions.question: In which year was the Nilgiri Mountain Railway built?
questions.explanation: The Nilgiri Mountain Railway (Toy Train) was built by the British in 1908.

questions.question: What did Muthu use to coax the baby elephant off the track?
options: D) A branch of a tree
questions.explanation: Muthu showed presence of mind by gently coaxing the baby elephant off the track using a bunch of bananas.

questions.question: You are travelling in a forest area and your vehicle stops because an animal is blocking the road. What should you do?
options: A) Honk loudly to scare it away
B) Get down and chase the animal
C) Wait quietly inside the vehicle until the animal moves
D) Throw stones at the animal
questions.explanation: When encountering wild animals, it is safest to wait quietly without disturbing them, as the train waited for the elephant.

questions.question: Who wrote the letter describing the trip to Ooty?
questions.explanation: The prose is a letter written by a student named Merlin to her friend Malli.

questions.question: What is the meaning of the word 'Snaking'?
questions.explanation: In the context of the train journey, 'snaking' means moving smoothly in a winding manner.

questions.question: What does the word 'Entranced' mean?
options: B) Filled with wonder and delight
questions.explanation: 'Entranced' means holding someone's entire attention, leaving them filled with wonder and delight.

questions.question: Which of the following sentences correctly uses the simple present tense for a habitual action?
options: A) Ravi is going to school at 8:30 a.m.
B) Ravi goes to school at 8:30 a.m.
C) Ravi went to school at 8:30 a.m.
D) Ravi will go to school at 8:30 a.m.
questions.explanation: Habitual actions must always be expressed in the Simple Present Tense.

questions.question: What was the ancient name of Ooty?
questions.explanation: Centuries ago, Udagamandalam (Ooty) was originally known by the ancient name Oththai-Kal Mandu.

questions.question: Why did the train stop suddenly with a thud?
options: B) A baby elephant was sitting on the track
D) A monkey jumped on the engine
questions.explanation: The train stopped abruptly because a baby elephant was sitting right on the railway track.

questions.question: You are planning a trip to a hill station. Which of the following items is essential to pack in your bag?
questions.explanation: Hill stations like Ooty have a cool climate, so packing warm woolen clothes is necessary.

questions.question: In which year was the Nilgiri Mountain Railway declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site?
questions.explanation: The railway was declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 2005.

questions.question: Why couldn't Geetha Madam stop the children from running out of the train?
options: B) The children were too fast
C) They wanted to see what had happened
questions.explanation: The children were highly curious and ran out excitedly to see what had happened.

questions.question: What is the meaning of 'Thud'?
questions.explanation: A 'thud' refers to a dull sound, such as that of a heavy object striking a solid surface.

questions.question: Choose the correct verb form: I will call you when dinner ____ ready.
questions.explanation: In conditional or time-dependent sentences, the subordinate clause uses the simple present tense.

questions.question: What is the total distance of the Nilgiri Mountain Railway route?
questions.explanation: The scenic route connecting Mettupalayam and Ooty covers a distance of 26 km.

questions.question: Ooty served as the summer capital of which presidency during British Rule?
questions.explanation: Ooty served as the official summer capital of the Madras Presidency during British Rule.

questions.question: Your friend is rushing to the hospital. What is the most supportive response you can give?
options: A) Complain they don't spend time with you
C) Offer your immediate help and support
D) Ask them to attend a party
questions.explanation: During life emergencies, showing empathy and offering assistance is the most appropriate response.

questions.question: Who was the class teacher on the trip?
questions.explanation: Geetha Madam was the class teacher who managed the students on the trip.

questions.question: How many syllables are in the word 'Wonderful'?
questions.explanation: The word 'Won-der-ful' is split into three parts, making it a 3-syllable word.

questions.question: How many bridges does the toy train cross?
questions.explanation: The railway includes 208 serpentine curves, 16 tunnels, and 250 bridges.

questions.question: What type of engine is used in the Nilgiri Mountain Railway?
questions.explanation: The Nilgiri Mountain Railway uses a Vintage Steam Locomotive for the journey.

questions.question: Fill in with correct tense: We saw an elephant while we ______ on a trip to Ooty.
questions.explanation: 'Were going' is the past progressive tense, showing a continuous action.

questions.question: How long does the uphill journey on the toy train take?
questions.explanation: Due to the steep hillside, the 26 km uphill journey takes almost 4 hours.

questions.question: Who built the Nilgiri Mountain Railway?
questions.explanation: Historically built by the British in 1908.

questions.question: Which animal snatched a banana from a girl?
questions.explanation: A bold monkey quickly snatched a banana from one of the girls.

questions.question: While travelling, a monkey suddenly enters and tries to take your snacks. What is the most appropriate action?
options: C) Stay calm, avoid eye contact, and let it take the food
questions.explanation: Staying calm and not provoking the animal prevents an attack.

questions.question: Why do we not usually see the landscape clearly from a regular express train?
options: B) The train travels too fast
questions.explanation: Regular express trains travel at high speeds, making the landscape blur past quickly.

questions.question: Who were the original inhabitants of Ooty?
questions.explanation: Ooty was originally inhabited by the indigenous tribal people called Todas.

questions.question: How many syllables are in the word 'Snatch'?
questions.explanation: The word 'Snatch' has a single vowel sound, making it a 1-syllable word.

questions.question: What sound was the mother elephant making when the baby was on the track?
questions.explanation: The protective mother elephant was trumpeting fiercely out of concern.

questions.question: Identify the grammatically correct sentence.
options: A) I am getting up every day at 6 a.m.
B) I have seen him yesterday.
C) I am thinking it's an interesting book.
questions.explanation: 'I saw him yesterday' is correct; present perfect cannot be used with 'yesterday'.

questions.question: How many tunnels does the toy train pass through?
questions.explanation: The scenic journey features 16 tunnels along its 26 km route.

questions.question: You want to invite your friend on a trip. Which communication format is correct?
questions.explanation: Informal Letter (Dear [Name]) is the correct format for friends.

questions.question: Which word is a synonym for 'spectacular'?
questions.explanation: 'Spectacular' means beautiful in a dramatic and eye-catching way.

questions.question: What is the maximum summer temperature in Ooty?
questions.explanation: Maximum summer temperature stays cool at around 21°C.

questions.question: How many students travelled on the toy train?
questions.explanation: A total of 20 girls and boys from Class 6 travelled on the toy train.

questions.question: Which of the following describes the word 'Coax'?
questions.explanation: 'Coax' means to gently and persistently persuade.

questions.question: What is the altitude of Udhagamandalam?
questions.explanation: Udhagamandalam is situated at a high altitude of 2240 meters.

questions.question: Who coaxed the baby elephant off the track?
questions.explanation: Muthu, the mischievous boy, showed presence of mind and coaxed the baby elephant away.
